---
name: 🔒 Security (public — low severity only)
about: For ALREADY-DISCLOSED or LOW-SEVERITY security findings. For an unpatched vulnerability, use the private advisory channel instead.
title: "[SECURITY] <one-line summary>"
labels: ["needs-triage"]
assignees: ''
---

> ⚠️ **STOP.** If this is an unpatched vulnerability, **DO NOT** open a public issue.
>
> Use the private advisory channel: **Security → Report a vulnerability** in the repo's Security tab, or:
> https://github.com/mpcs2013/currency-tracker/security/advisories/new
>
> Public issues are immediately indexed by search engines and visible to everyone watching the repo. Filing a vulnerability here *is* a public disclosure.

---
